subject: [RFC PATCH 10/40] mm: page_alloc: add superpageblock fullness lists for allocation steering

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch adds a new data structure to track the fullness of superpageblocks in memory, which are groups of pageblocks that can be allocated together as a single unit. The fullness is tracked by five buckets (FULL, 75%, 50%, 25%, ALMOST_EMPTY) and two categories (CLEAN vs TAINTED), allowing for efficient allocation steering without sorting. A separate list tracks completely free superpageblocks. The patch also adds a debugfs interface to display the superpageblock information.
